KEY: G major | METER: 4/4 | TEMPO: 58 | GRID: 64th (adaptive) | BARS: 63
VOICES: melody-1[prog=73], bass-2[prog=35], guit-3[prog=24], org-4[prog=18], string-5[prog=48], drums[drums]
@1 [-]
